product_overview: EurekaAI is an AI-powered study companion for competitive exam aspirants that offers guided problem solving, Feynman-style concept evaluation, focused study sessions with flashcard generation from PDFs, and a mistake-backed personal problem bank.
core_goals: Get stepwise, Socratic hints to work through practice problems rather than just answers
Explain concepts from memory and receive targeted AI feedback on gaps and strengths
Run distraction-free focus sessions using uploaded PDFs to generate flashcards and AI questions
Log, review, and learn from study mistakes with searchable entries and corrective notes
Save and manage a personal problem bank with status tracking and one-click solver integration
See an at-a-glance dashboard of study metrics and quick actions to resume practice

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new EurekaAI account and set a target exam to personalize study guidance.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Switch to Sign Up mode -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Select target exam -> Submit signup form -> See dashboard

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access protected study features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in wrong password -> Submit login form -> See error indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View high-level study metrics, problem of the day, weak areas, and use quick actions to jump into workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View solver session count -> View Feynman average score -> View open mistakes count -> View problem of the day -> View weak areas list -> Use quick action to start focus session -> Navigate to /focus
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use quick action to start a Feynman exercise -> Navigate to /feynman

features.name: Focus Session
features.description: Upload a PDF to generate flashcards and AI questions, then practice and receive AI feedback on answers.
user_flows: Navigate to /focus -> Upload PDF -> Select page range (optional) -> Start session -> See generated flashcards -> Navigate to next flashcard -> Type answer in response area -> Submit answer -> See AI feedback

features.name: Feynman Explainer
features.description: Explain a topic from memory, optionally include reference notes, and receive an AI evaluation with a score and targeted follow-ups.
user_flows: Navigate to /feynman -> Type topic -> Optionally upload notes -> Proceed to explain stage -> Type explanation from memory -> Submit for evaluation -> See score and list of strengths, gaps, and follow-up questions

features.name: Socratic Solver
features.description: Interact with a chat-based tutor that provides stepwise hints and encourages active problem solving.
user_flows: Navigate to /solver -> Type problem or question -> Optionally attach image -> Send problem to solver -> See AI hint or response -> Select hint suggestion -> Observe hint progress indicator -> Navigate to /dashboard

features.name: Mistake Journal
features.description: Record study mistakes with context and corrections, review past errors, and delete entries you no longer need.
user_flows: Navigate to /mistakes -> Add a new mistake entry -> Fill subject, topic, what went wrong, and correct approach -> Save mistake -> See list of mistakes -> Open a mistake to view details -> Delete the mistake

features.name: Problem Bank
features.description: Save personal problems, track their status, search and filter entries, and launch the solver for guided practice.
user_flows: Navigate to /problems -> View problem stats (total, solved, need revisit) -> Add new problem -> Fill title, subject, difficulty, source, and statement -> Save problem -> Search problems by title or topic -> Filter problems by subject and difficulty -> Open problem detail -> Launch solver for the problem -> Delete problem

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update personal information and target exam to tailor study recommendations.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View name and email -> Change target exam -> Save profile changes -> View session history

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent navigation to move quickly between the app's main sections and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Navigate to /focus -> Navigate to /feynman -> Navigate to /solver -> Navigate to /mistakes -> Navigate to /problems -> Navigate to /profile -> Sign out

tech_stack: Google Fonts (Syne, DM Sans, Playfair Display, JetBrains Mono)

routes.description: Landing page with hero, features, pricing and CTA
Login and signup page with email/password
Main user dashboard with stats, quick actions, and problem of the day
Focus session with PDF upload, flashcard generation, and Q&A
Feynman technique explainer with AI feedback and scoring
Socratic solver chatbot for guided problem-solving
Mistake journal to log and track errors
Personal problem bank with status tracking
User profile with exam selection and account settings
OAuth and email confirmation callback handler

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new account with name, email, password, and target exam

features.name: User Login
features.description: Log in with email and password
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View study stats, quick actions, problem of the day, and weak areas
user_interactions: Click Start Focus Session quick action
Click Feynman a Concept quick action

features.name: Focus Session
features.description: Upload a PDF, select page range, generate flashcards, and answer AI questions
user_interactions: Click upload area or drag PDF

features.name: Feynman Explainer
features.description: Pick a topic, optionally upload notes, explain it from memory, get AI score
user_interactions: Click Next to proceed to explain stage
View score, strengths, gaps, and follow-up questions

features.name: Socratic Solver
features.description: Chat-based AI tutor that guides problem-solving with hints
user_interactions: Type problem or question in text area
Press Enter or click send button
Click Back to return to dashboard

features.name: Mistake Journal
features.description: Log study mistakes with subject, topic, error type, and correction
user_interactions: Fill mistake form (subject, topic, what went wrong, correct approach)

features.name: Problem Bank
features.description: Personal collection of problems with status tracking and solver integration
user_interactions: View stats (total, solved, need revisit, subjects)
Fill problem form (title, subject, difficulty, source, statement)
Search problems by title or topic
Click problem to view detail panel
Click Solve with AI to launch solver

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update user info, exam selection, and account settings

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent sidebar with links to all main sections

known_limitations.issue: Focus session requires PDF upload to proceed — no demo mode
known_limitations.impact: Cannot test AI flashcard generation without a real PDF

known_limitations.issue: Solver and Feynman require valid API key in env — AI responses may fail without it
known_limitations.impact: Chat responses return error if GEMINI_API_KEY is not set

known_limitations.issue: Auth-protected routes redirect to /login if unauthenticated via middleware
known_limitations.impact: Tests must be authenticated or test login flow first
